examples: Why would anyone want to be labeled intolerant?
There are many explanations for intolerant attitudes, some dating back to childhood.
It is, of course, possible to disagree with an opinion without being intolerant of it.
If you are a lactose-intolerant, wheat-intolerant, or have too much candida, keep it to yourself.
As a symptom of its weakness, Miss Megawati's government has become increasingly intolerant of criticism.
